subject: Quote #BSQ-2026-1847 - Cedar Ridge Tournament Equipment
snippet: Here is the quote you requested for tournament replacement items...
body:
Hi Aaron,

Thank you for reaching out. Here is the quote for the tournament replacement items:

- 2x Adult Shinai (39-inch, Competition Grade) BS-SH-39-CG @ $45.00 each = $90.00
- 2x Adult Kote (Tournament Grade, Size L) BS-KT-TG-L @ $75.00 each = $150.00

Subtotal: $240.00
Shipping: FREE (orders over $200)
Tax: $0.00 (Oregon exempt)
Total: $240.00

Valid until January 20, 2027. Ships within 2 business days of order confirmation. Expected delivery January 9-11.

Let me know if you would like to proceed.

Best,
Sarah Chen
Budo Supply

subject: Equipment update - damaged kote
snippet: Found 2 adult L kote pairs with torn padding and removed them from active inventory.
body:
Aaron,

Quick update on the kendo equipment in Storage Room B. Found 2 adult kote pairs, Size L, with torn padding on the palmar side. Both fail the flex test. I moved them to the discard shelf, tagged them DAMAGED - REMOVE, and updated Airtable to show 3 functional adult L kote remaining.

The other 2 adult M kote are fine. Youth kote all look good.

- Raj

subject: Tournament prep day - Jan 10
snippet: Please have the equipment audit completed and the board updated before the session.
body:
Aaron,

Confirming the prep day schedule for January 10. Please have the equipment audit completed and the Monday board updated before the session. If we need to order anything, we should have it ordered by January 8 to guarantee delivery before tournament day.

Thanks,
Tom

subject: Cedar Ridge Tournament registration update
snippet: Ticket sales and registration capacity update for the tournament.
body: Your Eventbrite event has 118 registrations and 150 capacity. This is a registration notice only and does not contain equipment inventory counts.
